final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact restraint level and layout execution is yours
Composition: must be hero section layout with left column (text content), center (model with product), right column (product display + stats), bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include young East Asian woman smiling touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy studio backdrop — exact set design is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, bright lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple floral accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), navigation links "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ", CTA "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all UI elements in their described positions (logo top-left, 5 nav links, hero left column with headline/subhead/badges/bullets/CTAs, center model holding serum, right column with 2 product items and 3 stat cards, bottom 3 benefit cards), pill-shaped badges with icons, pink checkmarks, floating white rounded stat cards with gold accents, horizontal white rounded benefit cards
Avoid:
